title: Execution Profile
description: Named, immutable execution profile that aggregates fill_mode, cost_config, slippage, and volume_limit into a single auditable contract. Every formal BacktestResult and registry artifact records execution_profile_id + execution_profile_version + execution_profile_hash so reviewers can reproduce or diff the exact execution semantics. Plan PR 3 of 2026-05-26 freeze plan.

profile_id.description: Stable identifier (e.g., 'joinquant_daily_sim'). Recorded into every formal artifact.

profile_version.description: Date-stamped revision tag (e.g., '2026-05-26.v1'). Bumped whenever an execution-relevant field changes.

deployment_target.description: Which downstream deployment this profile is faithful to. Used by reviewers to confirm a profile matches the live target.

backend.description: Which backtest engine this profile targets. Formal runs MUST use event_driven; vectorized is screening-only.

fill_mode.description: Engine fill model. open_close = pre-market orders at OPEN, on_bar orders at CLOSE. jq_daily_avg = both phases fill at (open+close)/2 (JoinQuant daily backtest parity).

cost_config_factory.description: Resolves to a CostConfig instance. joinquant_default = JoinQuant OrderCost equivalent (stamp tax constant, no transfer fee). realistic_china = actual Chinese exchange with 2023-08-28 stamp-tax cut and 0.2 bps transfer fee.

slippage_preset.description: Named slippage model. JOINQUANT_DEFAULT_SLIPPAGE = FixedSlippage(0.0003) = 0.3 bps on ¥10 stocks. CONSERVATIVE_SLIPPAGE_10BPS = PctSlippage(0.001) = 10 bps.

volume_limit.description: Max fraction of daily volume per order (e.g., 0.25 = 25%).

allowed_for_formal.description: When true, this profile may produce artifacts that pass the formal release gate. Screening-only profiles set this to false so a vectorized screening run cannot accidentally publish as formal.

notes.description: Free-text reviewer notes — included in profile_hash so changing the note bumps the hash (forcing a profile_version bump too).
